connectWithCommunity.title: Connect With Our Community
connectWithCommunity.description: Our community is united by one goal - emotional development, awareness and inner balance. We are here to connect with people who are ready to better understand their emotions, develop emotional intelligence and create a more peaceful, stable life. Share your experiences, the knowledge and vision you have discovered along the way - your voice and your story are important to us.
connectWithCommunity.ctadescription: Share your experience, question, or opinion — our space brings together people striving for emotional growth and inner balance. We are always ready to listen and assist you.

contactFormShort.name: Your Name
contactFormShort.submitMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent!

contactFormFull.title: Send Us a Message
contactFormFull.submitMessage: Your message has been sent successfully!

AboutPage.introQuote: Your emotions are your friends - they will show you when you are losing touch with yourself and when you are starting to regain it.
AboutPage.missionBox: Emotional intelligence is not a theory – it’s a skill that can transform your life.
AboutPage.credentialsText: I am the first and currently the only Emotional Intelligence Mentor in Georgia, representing the 'Six Seconds' international network. I have academic education and certificates in emotional intelligence, neuroscience, and coaching.
AboutPage.storyText1: I know what it's like to feel like you're falling apart from the inside - when everything seems fine on the outside, but inside you have no strength left. For years, I've been trying to free myself from stress and inner turmoil.
AboutPage.storyText2: Until I finally discovered that emotions are not a weakness. They are our greatest source of energy.
AboutPage.certificatesDescription: Each certificate is a step that made me a better mentor and gave me the knowledge to share the power of emotional intelligence with others.
AboutPage.service1Text: Understand the true reasons for your beliefs and create a conscious relationship with yourself.
AboutPage.service3Text: Find emotional balance and deepen relationships with others.
AboutPage.finalMission: Today, I work with people who are ready to bring awareness, emotional intelligence, and inner peace into their lives. My mission is to help you discover yourself, synchronize your mind and emotions, and find a path where you no longer need to struggle - just be, grow, and live with love.

HomePage.heroText: Make friends with your emotions and start living a more peaceful life. Here you will learn how to recognize stress, fatigue, and fear, how to see opportunities where you previously saw difficulties.
HomePage.mediaSectionTitle: YOU MAY HAVE SEEN ME IN:
HomePage.aboutTitle: Nutsa Bakhtadze - Your Guide to Emotional Transformation
HomePage.aboutText1: I am Nutsa Bakhtadze, a certified EQ coach at the Global Emotional Intelligence Institute at Six Seconds
HomePage.aboutTextsixsecoundtext: And their EQ leader in Georgia. I am also a certified Belief Clearing Practitioner with the Global Sciences Foundation.
HomePage.aboutTextInserted: My mission is to help you Find inner peace Develop emotional intelligence Build sincere relationships with yourself and others.
HomePage.aboutText2: I believe that emotional intelligence gives each person the power to live with more peace, purpose, and true connections. To this end, I am building an EQ culture in Georgia, for children, teens, parents, professionals, and teams.
HomePage.missionTitle: Life is not just about surviving.
HomePage.missionText: Maybe you've been waking up for a long time just out of obligation, thinking it's normal, but deep inside you feel that something is missing.
HomePage.missionTextTwo: It's time to realize that emotions are not enemies; they are your most trustworthy guides.
HomePage.missionTextTwo1: If you know all this, you are not alone:
missionList: You often feel low on energy and don’t understand why.
Sometimes unable to control reactions and then regret it.
Difficulty making decisions because fear holds you back.
Sometimes you hear a voice telling you, I deserve more.

testimonials.text: 46% of people struggle with managing their emotions and finding inner calm — this often leads to stress, exhaustion, and a persistent sense of internal tension. However, conscious work on oneself creates the opportunity to transform this experience into a stable, fulfilling, and resilient inner state.
testimonials.author: Research: Six Seconds

testimonials.text: For the first time in my life, I feel my emotions are managed and inner peace allows me to make decisions with confidence and depth.
testimonials.author: Anonymous client

testimonials.text: I transitioned from constant stress and emotional chaos to a conscious, stable, and meaningful life, where I manage emotions and feel inner calm.
testimonials.author: Anonymous client

methods: COACHING – Individual sessions to recognize and transform emotions
COURSES – Online programs and challenges for emotional intelligence development
SPEAKING – Trainings, workshops, and events for organizations
HomePage.palmSectionTitle: What does it feel like to live a life where emotions and reason work together?
HomePage.palmSectionText: This is a life where you are no longer lost.
HomePage.palmSectionText1: You don't automatically move from morning to night - only with obligations
currentState: You get lost in everyday life and don't know where you are really going.
You are often tired, empty and always missing something.
You make decisions - out of fear, out of learned habits.
HomePage.message: This means that it's time to shake things up and look at life differently. Where it is possible, your everyday life should be:
possibleState: With full energy and inner peace.
Where you make decisions consciously, with love.
Where emotions are already your companion and guide.
HomePage.supportMessage: I'll be with you through this process - helping your mind and emotions work as a team.
HomePage.palmSectionButton: See how we can work together

palmStats.text: Studies show that people who consciously process their emotions find greater inner peace, stability, and harmony with themselves.

Emotionally intelligent people are more attuned to others — strengthening relationships, trust, and empathy. When you learn to express emotions consciously, your connections become filled with warmth and clarity.
Emotional intelligence doesn’t mean perfection — it’s the ability to stay calm in the storm.  When you observe your reactions with awareness, you begin to live with freedom and compassion.

HomePage.palmReminderSubtitle: If you feel you deserve more peace, freedom, and inner strength —
HomePage.palmReminderText: This is your inner voice telling you: it's time to start changing, it's time to return to yourself, to live the way you feel you can.
HomePage.finalCTAText: THE EQ TRANSFORMATION PROGRAM is a unique hybrid program that combines individual coaching, group support, and practical application of emotional intelligence in real life. You will receive everything you need to elevate your consciousness and create stable inner balance.
HomePage.finalCTATitle: You can choose a different path or change your current path.

ResultsPage.heroTitle:
Your Emotions Are Your "Power,"
Learn How to Master Them
ResultsPage.heroText: Learn to manage emotions and develop emotional intelligence. Discover how EQ helps restore inner peace and balance in life.
ResultsPage.methodsSectionTitle: What Emotional Intelligence Brings to Your Life
ResultsPage.methodsSectionText: EQ is not just a way of thinking — it’s a lifestyle. It helps you become aware of your emotions, act more calmly, and build healthy relationships.

methods.title: Awareness and Balance
methods.description: You learn to recognize your emotions and manage them so that stress and unexpected reactions no longer make you lose your mind.

methods.title: How Emotional Intelligence Changes Your Life
methods.description: Learn how EQ helps you feel better, think better, and act better.

methods.title: Purpose and Results
methods.description: You learn how to organize your thoughts and emotions so that you are more confident in yourself, know what you want, and are able to achieve it.

ResultsPage.resultsSectionSubtitle: What You Gain from the Course
results: Emotions will no longer take you where you don't want to go. It often happens that a strong emotion overwhelms you and you don't know how to calm down? Do you learn how to maintain balance even when everything is in turmoil?
Here you learn how not to lose your head in difficult moments and how to regain your composure much faster.
You better understand why you are sad or angry. Both teenagers and adults often have difficulty seeing the reason. You learn how to understand what emotions are telling you.
You look at conflicts with a completely different eye. Quarrels, misunderstandings, tense conversations... We all have them. The course will show you how to sort out relationships during conflicts.
Clarity appears: what you want, who you are and what you need. It doesn't matter if you are a teenager or an adult. When emotional intelligence grows, you understand your desires better.
You no longer need to be in the shadows. You no longer hide your emotions. You learn how Express yourself calmly, naturally and confidently.
You find energy in your emotions, not fatigue. Where you used to feel tired or unmotivated, you begin to find energy, motivation and purpose.
ResultsPage.resultsQuote: This course will teach you how to manage your emotions so that life, career, relationships, and decisions become much easier and more peaceful.
ResultsPage.ctaText: Your emotions are your guides. It’s time to listen to them.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how your personal data is collected, used, and protected by Nutsa Bakhtadze — Certified Emotional Intelligence Coach and Six Seconds Practitioner.
privacy.collectList: Name and contact information (if you provide it)
Cookie and analytics data (Google Analytics / Meta Pixel)
privacy.usageText: Your data is used solely for communication, service delivery, and improving user experience. We do NOT share or sell your data to third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern the delivery of coaching sessions, programs, and consultations.
terms.bookingText: Sessions are scheduled by prior agreement. Payment is made in advance or by individual arrangement.
terms.cancelText: Sessions can be canceled at least 24 hours in advance. Otherwise, the payment is non-refundable.

use.title: Terms of Use
use.intro: By using this website, you agree to the following terms. If you do not agree, please stop using the website.
use.intellectualText: All materials on this website (videos, texts, visuals, content) are protected by copyright. Copying or distribution is prohibited without permission.
use.userText: Users are responsible for using the website in a lawful and proper manner.

hero.subtitle: Individual coaching, your path to emotional transformation
hero.title: It's time to get to know your emotions better and feel peace and direction in your life.
hero.text: If you feel emotionally drained, this space is created just for you.
hero.text3: Begin your transformation today and discover your emotional strength.
hero.text5: Here begins your inner journey: exploring emotional intelligence, living consciously, and experiencing slow, gentle, yet very real transformation.
hero.text6: Don't wait for the perfect time. Start now.

additionalServices.title: Additional Services
additionalServices.subtitle: Customized Solutions for Your Organization's Needs

items.title: Emotional Intelligence Assessment
items.description: A short, effective and business-oriented EQ analysis - for individuals and teams, using the SEI model, additional testing costs.
items.bulet3: • Teams who want to improve stress and communication

items.title: Leadership Coaching
items.description: 1:1 sessions for managers who want to strengthen stress management, emotional resilience and improve the quality of decisions.
items.bulet6: • Team leaders who often make difficult decisions

items.title: Train the trainer
items.description: Empowering internal trainers with EQ methods, communication skills and modern group management techniques.
items.bulet9: • Companies that want to standardize training

items.title: Emotional Intelligence Diagnostics
items.description: Assessment of the emotional culture, stress levels, collaboration and communication dynamics of the organization - with a simple and effective model.
items.bulet12: • Companies that want to improve culture
